    runAnySuccessAsync(Collection, AsyncTask.ScopeOptions) - Static method in class org.tavall.couriers.api.concurrent.AsyncTask
    "First success wins" helper: cancels the other subtasks when one succeeds.
    runAsync(Callable) - Static method in class org.tavall.couriers.api.concurrent.AsyncTask
     
    runAsync(Callable, AsyncTask.ScopeOptions) - Static method in class org.tavall.couriers.api.concurrent.AsyncTask
    Runs one task "async inside, sync outside": fork in a new (virtual) thread, join, return result.
    runAsync(QRMetaData, Callable) - Static method in class org.tavall.couriers.api.qr.cache.QRCodeCache

    runMultipleAsync(Collection, AsyncTask.ScopeOptions) - Static method in class org.tavall.couriers.api.concurrent.AsyncTask
    Runs tasks concurrently and returns results, FAIL-FAST style (throws if any task fails).
    runMultipleAsync(List, AsyncTask.ScopeOptions, int, boolean) - Static method in class org.tavall.couriers.api.concurrent.AsyncTask
    The "boolean knobs" batch runner:
